label: 5th & 6th Schedule
title: Fifth and Sixth Schedules
note: Special administration of tribal areas. Fifth Schedule: scheduled areas in States other than Assam, Meghalaya, Tripura and Mizoram. Sixth Schedule: tribal areas in those four States.

head: Schedule
States / areas
rows: Scheduled areas in States other than Assam, Meghalaya, Tripura and Mizoram (Art 244(1))
Tribal areas of Assam, Meghalaya, Tripura and Mizoram (Art 244(2))
